name: Inkling Cats : Beneath the dreams
short_description: Inkling Cats is a colorful roguelike adventure where every game is a journey different from the previous one. Choose between 3 characters with very different playstyles and weapon crafting mechanics, and paint every enemy away until the end of the story!
detailed_description:
Dive into Inkling Cats, an explosive and colorful roguelike RPG adventure where every game is a new journey waiting to be discovered. Play solo or team up with friends in local co-op mode with up to three players and face the challenges that await you.

Welcome to the World of Inkling Cats!

In Inkling Cats, you’ll venture through the pages of an enchanted book, battling a myriad of unique monsters and formidable bosses.

  • Discover mysterious items, upgrades, and magical cards, combining them to unlock infinite synergies and unique powers every time you play.

  • The precious ink drops you collect are key to your survival: use them wisely to trade, acquire extraordinary items, and upgrade your equipment.

  • Every strategic decision could change the course of your adventure!

The Protagonists and Modes

Live the dreams of young Liam, a creative child who brings incredible stories to life through his drawings.

  • Play as his three adorable plush kittens—Spok, Smuk, and Skrat—and take on epic challenges. Choose from various game difficulties, unlock new items and cards.

  • Each game with the unlocked characters will be a fresh and thrilling adventure.

Discover Your Unique Style!

Each character in Inkling Cats offers a distinct playstyle and a customizable weapon.

  • Build and assemble your weapon in surprising ways, enhancing each component individually or replacing it with unique pieces and effects.

  • Customize your equipment to create lethal combinations and adapt your strategy to each challenge you encounter.

The Book of Inkling Cats

The magical book of Inkling Cats will take you through nine unique chapters, each with its own atmosphere and challenges.

Start from the first page and progressively unlock new chapters, choosing your path and discovering new adventures.

Each chapter offers special pages where you can trade, obtain powers, discover rare items, or face special challenges. No story will ever be the same, and you will always be the protagonist!

Get ready to dive into a world of endless fantasy and strategy. The world of Inkling Cats is in your hands: are you ready to write your legend?

supported_languages: English, Italian, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal
